Module 5
Creating Your PLC, Part 4
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 8 --

Full Motion Video
• 	You need a good script
• 	Effectiveness varies with “talent”… but you don’t have to be an actor
• 	People want YOU, not an actor
• 	You will get better with practice…
• 	Much easier with a teleprompter
Module 5: Creating Your Prelaunch Content
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 8 --

Full Motion Video
• 	Teleprompters don’t work outside
• 	Complicated… just plain trickier all around
• 	Some people use “green screen”
• 	Harder to edit
• 	Can also be “quick and dirty”
Module 5: Creating Your Prelaunch Content
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 8 --

Full Motion Video
Cameras
• 	Lots of options, and they’re always changing
• 	It’s not about the camera
• 	I’ve made super successful videos with a $100 camera
• 	You can even use your phone
• 	External audio input is very important
• 	Audio monitoring is VERY nice to have
Module 5: Creating Your Prelaunch Content
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 8 --

Full Motion Video
Camera choices
• 	Your phone - especially if you can use external audio
• 	Video camera - constantly changing, we’ve used the Canon Vixia in
the past
• 	DSLR - we’re currently using Canon 5d and Canon 6d (expensive)
• 	Remember - it’s not about the camera
Module 5: Creating Your Prelaunch Content
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 8 --

Full Motion Video
Audio is super important
• 	Watch for wind noise when outside
• 	Use an external mic
• 	Lavalier mics (or lav mics or lapel mics) come in wired and
wireless… starting at $30
• 	We use the Sennheiser EW112PG2 (very expensive)
Module 5: Creating Your Prelaunch Content
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 8 --

Full Motion Video
Teleprompter
• 	Very nice to have, if only for bullet points
• 	You look directly into the camera while reading from the
teleprompter
• 	Can be expensive, but you can make your own with an iPad
• 	I got mine at PrompterPeople.com (expensive)
